docs: add tiered implementation plans for remaining work

Tier 1 - Production Readiness:
  - Rewrite CI/CD workflows for mcp_amdsmi/ structure
  - Docker build validation and docker-compose.yml
  - Graceful NOT_SUPPORTED error handling with fallback suggestions

Tier 2 - Feature Gaps:

  - Event notification polling wrapper (stretch)
  - Performance counter managed sessions (stretch)

Tier 3 - Polish:
  - CodeMode integration tests (search -> schema -> execute pipeline)
  - Robust firmware name mapping for multiple API formats
  - docker-compose.yml creation
  - Prompt content hardening with MI300X-specific guidance

commit.message:
fix: extend year dropdown to 2022 and backfill TMG report config

Extend boards year dropdown from ±2 years to -4/+2 years so 2023 is
visible. Add backfill script that propagated report definitions from
Jan 2023 tasks to all 113 sibling tasks (Feb 2023–Mar 2026) by name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(admin): move TableToolbar outside AdminPage to fix search input focus loss (#1)

Inner function components get a new identity on every parent render,
causing React to unmount/remount the component — and the search input
loses focus after each keystroke. Moving TableToolbar to module scope
gives it a stable identity so the input stays focused while typing.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: generar remito Excel para hojas preimpresas

Agrega la funcionalidad de descargar un archivo Excel (.xlsx) con los
datos del remito posicionados exactamente para imprimir sobre hojas
de remito preimpresas de VAL ARG.

- Instala exceljs para generación server-side con soporte completo
  de estilos, column widths, row heights, merged cells y margins
- Crea src/lib/excel/remito-generator.ts con layout exacto del template:
  anchos de columna, alturas de fila, celdas mergeadas, fonts Arial
- Crea GET /api/delivery-notes/[id]/excel que genera y descarga el .xlsx
- Agrega botón "Descargar Excel" en la vista de detalle del remito
- Soporta paginación: si hay más de 9 items, genera hojas adicionales

Remove redundant train_binary.py — train.py is the canonical script

feat(admin): mandatory image processing and original/processed toggle (#111)

* feat(admin): mandatory image processing and original/processed toggle

- Display processed images by default with toggle to view original in lightbox
- Auto-open image processor (crop/blur/arrow) when uploading new images
- Block saving unprocessed images (disabled save button + warning banner)
- Remove unprocessed addImages code path from handleSave
- Cancel processing removes unprocessed image from queue (mandatory flow)
- Add amber "Pendiente" badge for unprocessed new images

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: upload images to S3 before processing to avoid 413 payload limit

- Add newImageUrl support to process-image API (downloads from S3 instead of receiving base64)
- Frontend uploads files to S3 via /api/upload in background on file select
- Send S3 URL to process-image API instead of base64 data URL
- Add uploading overlay and disable save while uploads are in progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: compress images client-side before upload to avoid 413

Compress images to 1920x1920 JPEG (quality 0.85, max 3MB) using existing
compressImageDataUrl utility before uploading to S3. Converts compressed
data URL to Blob for FormData upload. Prevents 413 Content Too Large
errors on both /api/upload and /api/admin/deas/[id]/process-image.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): remove build-time version overwrites, add version bump check

- Remove sed/node version overwrites from release-mobile-app.yml
  (Android build.gradle + iOS project.pbxproj). Versions are now
  managed solely by propagate-version.js at dev time, not by CI.
- Add version-bump-check.js to migration-safety CI job (reuses
  existing base branch checkout).
- Disable automatic triggers on legacy build-android.yml and
  build-ios.yml to prevent double builds (kept as manual fallback).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): create GitHub Release alongside tag in ensure-tags.yml

ensure-tags.yml now creates both the git tag AND the GitHub Release
when a new mobile version is detected on push to main. The release
is created before triggering the build workflow, so it's visible
immediately.

The create-release job in release-mobile-app.yml is already
idempotent (skips if release exists), so no conflict.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Fix docs: sync uses GitHub repo Contents API, not Gists

All CLAUDE.md files incorrectly described the sync layer as using
GitHub Gists. The app actually syncs via the GitHub Contents API
to a repository. Updated function references, data structures,
and descriptions to match the actual implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Session 166b: Heartland adapter goldmine — raw .dat file scraping

Replace ~280 CGI AJAX requests (Puppeteer) with 3 direct HTTP fetches of raw
flat files: schedule.dat (all matches), team.dat (all teams), subdiv_name.dat
(subdivision metadata). Filters to Premier-only via subdivision level field.

Results: 5,016 Premier matches from 3 requests (vs 816 from old CGI approach).
Spring 2026 matches: 2,093 → 4,904 (+2,811). Season total: 12,126.
CGI approach retained as fallback if .dat files are unavailable.

Fix app breaking after tab switch with visibility-change reconnection

When the browser tab is backgrounded, Supabase realtime WebSocket
connections drop and auth tokens can expire. Added visibilitychange
handlers in AuthContext that:
- Refresh the auth session if the token is near expiry
- Reconnect the Supabase realtime WebSocket with a fresh token
- Re-fetch all notification counts
- Re-ping user presence status

commit.message:
Initial release: polite, pipeline-friendly web crawler

- CLI with --depth, --max-pages, --delay, --ignore-robots, --topic flags
- Priority frontier queue with URL scoring heuristics (article boost,
  source bonus for sitemap/search, depth penalty)
- Sitemap discovery with recursive sitemap index support
- Topic-based URL discovery via DuckDuckGo HTML search
- robots.txt support via robots-parser with crawl-delay honoring
- URL normalization (tracking param removal, fragment stripping, dedup)
- Same-domain filtering, binary extension rejection
- 49 passing tests across 9 test suites
- CLAUDE.md contributor guide, README with architecture docs

spectacular effect — now it sits alongside the other popular
dramatic effects and gets keyboard shortcut "0".

usage at 10 and ~0 interactions respectively). Both still work
via keyboard (O and I) for power users.

allowing unbounded output that caused sporadic timeouts. Added

client-side timeout from 120s to 180s for DeepSeek load spike headroom.

commit.message:
Remove WAF, add Lambda concurrency kill switch with configurable re-enable

- Remove CDK-managed WAF (security.ts deleted); replace with CloudFront
  flat-rate plan (enrolled in AWS console, $0/month Free tier)
- Kill switch now sets reservedConcurrentExecutions=0 on all Lambdas;
  API Gateway returns 429 with no invocations
- EventBridge Scheduler auto-restores concurrency after configurable delay:
  beta=3 min (for testing), prod=4 hours
- Kill switch deployed in beta (manual SNS trigger) and prod (CloudWatch
  SustainedTrafficAlarm: API GW ≥550 req/min × 3 consecutive windows)
- Beta gets standalone SNS topic with KillSwitchTopicArn stack output;
  prod reuses monitoring alertTopic
- Re-enable handler calls DeleteFunctionConcurrency for beta (no reserved
  concurrency normally) and PutFunctionConcurrency for prod
- API Gateway throttle (burst/rate) now configurable via ThrottleConfig in
  shared environment config (all envs: rate=10 req/s, burst=20)
- Add killSwitchEnabled feature flag and killSwitchReEnableMinutes to
  MonitoringConfig in shared types
- Add BOTPROTECTION.md: 5 defense layers, CloudFront flat-rate plan setup,
  kill switch trigger/recovery per env, worst-case cost analysis (~$91/month)
- Update all docs (COSTS, DEPLOYMENT, SPECIFICATION, README) to remove
  WAF/Cloudflare references and cross-reference BOTPROTECTION.md
- Rewrite kill-switch-handler tests for Lambda/Scheduler SDK; delete
  security.test.ts (construct removed); 313 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(chat+image): locale priority, NSFW de-escalation guard, QA 9.4/10

- resolveLocale: request locale now takes priority over franc detection,
  fixing EN-in-FR-context and ES→PT confusion (multilingual 10/10)
- NSFW de-escalation guard: verifySceneType runs for ALL NSFW returns,
  not just SFW→NSFW escalation — SFW images after NSFW conversation
  now correctly render clothed scenes
- Solo enforcement strengthened: "No man, no second person, no couple"
- Memory regex gate: added pet-related triggers (mon chat, s'appelle)
- Qwen3 sampling: presence_penalty=1.5, top_k=20, top_p=0.8
- New pod pxrcyugnavh8iw (RTX A5000 24GB, $0.16/hr)
- QA test scripts for memory, multilingual, 10-pose validation

commit.message:
feat: Rewrite from Bot API to Telethon (MTProto) for full history access

Telegram's Bot API cannot read message history — only new messages via
getUpdates, which also conflicts with bot gateways. This rewrites telecrawl
to use Telethon (MTProto user API) for complete chat history access.

New:
- sync.py: Full history sync via iter_messages(), incremental via min_id
- tail.py: Real-time event listener daemon for continuous capture
- auth.py: Two-step headless authentication for servers
- __main__.py: Module execution support (python -m telecrawl)
- FTS5 query sanitization for dots, hyphens, URLs
- systemd service documentation

Changed:
- cli.py: Telethon credentials (API_ID/API_HASH), tail command, --full flag
- db.py: _sanitize_fts_query() for special character handling
- requirements.txt: telethon replaces requests
- README.md: Complete rewrite for Telethon architecture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Rebuild as visual audit mode

Instead of following step-by-step instructions, the system now:
1. Identifies which Klaviyo pages each article references
2. Screenshots those pages in the live app
3. Asks GPT to compare article text against live screenshots
4. Reports UI mismatches (renamed buttons, moved menus, etc.)

Much faster, no account state needed, no fragile CSS selectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Default to source comments, not pre-canned summaries
